name: timelapse-capture
description: Fire-and-forget visual timelapse capture for long-running app review.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if(process.env.npm_config_global==='true'&&!process.env.CI){const x=require('child_process').execSync;try{x('npx playwright install chromium',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){process.stderr.write('Run: npx playwright install chromium\n')}const h=c=>{try{x((process.platform==='win32'?'where ':'which ')+c,{stdio:'ignore'});return true}catch(e){return false}};if(!h('ffmpeg')||!h('ffprobe')){const f={darwin:'brew install ffmpeg',linux:'sudo apt-get install ffmpeg'};console.log('\nffmpeg/ffprobe not found: '+(f[process.platform]||'https://ffmpeg.org/download.html'))}}"
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
